# Postback event inflation

## Signal corrupted

Attribution and conversion.

## What it is

Conversion or in-app events are over-reported or misclassified through partner integrations.

## How it appears in public evidence

A partner appears to generate high-value events.

## Why it matters

This pattern matters because it can cause audiences, platforms, customers, or investors to infer genuine demand from a signal that has been strategically shaped or detached from its real context.

## Research red flags

Compare event logs with backend truth and user-level behaviour.

## Ethical boundary

The safe distinction is whether the tactic improves truthful discovery or falsifies the evidence of discovery. This card is for analysis and detection, not execution.

## Evidence status

Use official policy, regulator guidance, platform integrity reports, academic research, or reputable reporting before making public claims. Treat community chatter as anecdotal unless independently corroborated.
